_meta.purpose: Local mirror of the TicketSpice 'Actions' tab (conditional show/hide logic) for THIS page. One actions file per TicketSpice page, sibling to the page HTML.
_meta.sync_protocol: Mat is the source of truth on the live TicketSpice page. When he adds/edits/removes an Action there, he reports it and Crowdly updates this file to match. Crowdly never invents an Action Mat hasn't confirmed live.
changelog: 2026-06-08 (Mat edits, blackberry go-live): Mat DELETED the 3 blackberry date-gate actions (hide-blackberry-before-jun20, hide-blackberry-aug4-sep30, hide-blackberry-boxoffice-before-jun2) — crop date windowing now handled at the Ticket Date Selection range (Jun 12 -> Aug 1 placeholder) instead of per-pass rules. Mat also REMOVED 'Blackberry Fun Pass' (online) from the after-May-24 teardown so the online blackberry pass now shows. Net: 12 actions -> 9.

field_guide.match: 'any' (When Any...) = OR across conditions; 'all' (When All...) = AND across conditions
field_guide.enabled: true if currently active on the live page
